title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 5 November 2024.

items.title: New ** Xbox Game Pass** titles for console, PC and Cloud dated
bullets: Arriving:
StarCraft: Remastered (PC) – November 5
StarCraft II: Campaign Collection (PC) – November 5
Metal Slug Tactics (Cloud, Console, and PC) – November 5
Go Mecha Ball (Console) – November 6
Harold Halibut (Xbox Series S/X) – November 6
The Rewinder (Console) – November 6
Turnip Boy Robs a Bank (Console) – November 6
Goat Simulator Remastered (Cloud, PC, and Xbox Series S/X) - November 7
Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 (Cloud, PC, and Xbox Series S/X) - November 19
Leaving (November 15th):
Dicey Dungeons (Cloud, Console, and PC)
Dungeons 4 (Cloud, Console, and PC)
Goat Simulator (PC)
Like a Dragon: Ishin! (Cloud, Console, and PC)
Like a Dragon: The Man Who Erased His Name (Cloud, Console, and PC)
Persona 5 Tactica (Cloud, Console, and PC)
Somerville (Cloud, Console, and PC)

items.title: **Atari** acquires Transport Tycoon IP
bullets: Chris Saywer's classic management game added to publisher's growing portfolio of retro brands
Atari already holds the publishing rights to Chris Sawyer's 2004 spiritual successor Locomotion, as well as sister franchise RollerCoaster Tycoon.

items.title: **Radical Forge** raises £2.6m
bullets: Investment to go towards team expansion, the release of Southfield, and more
Money raised via NPIF II – Mercia Equity Finance (which is a part of the Northern Powerhouse Investment Fund II).

items.title: **Supercell** acquires Space Ape
bullets: The Finnish company already owned 62% of Space Ape, with this acquisition due to close by spring 2025, with a London office operational by then as well.

items.title: **Bethesda** to shut down The Elder Scrolls Legends
bullets: Servers for card game to be retired in January 2025, has also been delisted on Steam

items.title: **Remedy** Q3 Results
bullets: Revenue: €17.9 million (up 129%)
Operating loss: €2.4 million (compared to operating loss of €5.5 million for same quarter last year)

items.title: **Nintendo** has lowered its Switch forecast after sales declined 31%
bullets: The company made no mention of its next console in its latest earnings report

items.title: ** Netflix** is eliminating its interactive shows in December
bullets: Matt Layzell, creator of the streamer's animated series Battle Kitty, claimed on Instagram that his show and others like it would be removed as Netflix "wipes the slate clean of their interactive programs."
Would include Black Mirror: Bandersnatch and Minecraft: Story Mode
Supposedly happens December 1st

items.title: **Ubisoft**’s NFT RPG has reportedly been plagued by a single player auto-winning every game
bullets: The player has two accounts
Apparently the accounts have been banned but are still auto-winning
As the game is strictly PVP, this renders the game unplayable
Players report they are being automatched with one of the two accounts and auto lose before the match even starts

items.title: **Pokemon TCG Pocket** is currently earning 3x more per day than Pokemon Go, estimates suggest
bullets: Data suggests the mobile game has made $12 million in the first four days of release
